title: calathiana verna subsp. aestiva
intro: Calathiana verna subsp. aestiva, also known as the vernal gentian or spring gentian, is a plant species in the gentian family that is characterized by its yellow or yellow-green flowers. The medicinal properties of Calathiana verna subsp. aestiva include its bitter compounds and alkaloids, which have been used to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and nausea. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to improve appetite, reduce inflammation, and have antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of Calathiana verna subsp. aestiva include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues.
